mapper.select: SELECT * FROM ( SELECT ROWNUM AS num, A.* FROM ( SELECT board.b_id AS b_id, b_title, b_thumbnail AS b_thumbnail, ROUND(AVG(b_review_score),1) AS b_review_score, COUNT(DISTINCT b_review_id) AS review_count, MIN(b_op_price) AS b_op_price, u_s_com, b_type FROM board,board_option,users_seller,review WHERE board.b_id = board_option.b_id AND board.u_s_id = users_seller.u_s_id AND board.b_id = review.b_id AND b_type='생활라이프' GROUP BY board.b_id,b_title,b_thumbnail,u_s_com,b_type ORDER BY b_id DESC ) A ) WHERE num BETWEEN #{start} AND #{end}

SELECT board.b_id AS b_id, b_title, b_thumbnail, b_view_count, b_prod_on_off, b_content, b_img_url, b_op_price, b_type, b_view_count, board.u_s_id AS u_s_id, u_s_com, u_s_profileimg_url, u_s_carrer, u_s_zone FROM board,board_option,board_image,users_seller WHERE board.b_id = board_option.b_id AND board.b_id = board_image.b_id AND board.u_s_id = users_seller.u_s_id AND board.b_id=#{b_id} AND ROWNUM=1

SELECT u.u_id, r.root, r.depth, r.group_id, r.b_review_score, b.b_id AS b_id, r.u_s_id AS u_s_id, r.b_review_id AS b_review_id, r.b_review_createdat, r.b_review_content, u.u_nickname, u.u_profileimg_url, ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM review r2 WHERE r2.group_id = r.group_id AND r2.depth = 2 ) AS reply FROM review r JOIN board b ON b.b_id = r.b_id JOIN users u ON r.u_id = u.u_id WHERE b.b_id = #{b_id} ORDER BY r.group_id DESC, r.depth ASC, r.b_review_createdat ASC
SELECT r_image_url FROM review_image WHERE b_review_id = #{b_review_id} ORDER BY r_image_id ASC
SELECT b_id,ROUND(AVG(b_review_score),1) AS b_review_score, COUNT(b_review_id) AS review_count FROM review WHERE b_id=#{b_id} GROUP BY b_id
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO review (b_review_id, u_s_id, b_id, u_id, b_review_createdat, b_review_content, b_review_score, depth, group_id) VALUES (re_id_seq.nextval, #{u_s_id}, #{b_id}, #{u_id}, TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS'), #{b_review_content}, #{b_review_score}, 1, re_id_seq.CURRVAL )

INSERT INTO review (b_review_id, u_s_id, b_id, u_id, b_review_createdat, b_review_content, depth, group_id) VALUES (re_id_seq.nextval, #{u_s_id}, #{b_id}, #{u_id}, TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS'), #{b_review_content}, 2, #{group_id} )
mapper.select: SELECT b_title, b_thumbnail, b_content, b_id FROM board ORDER BY b_createdat FETCH FIRST 3 ROWS ONLY
